title: Third Person Cockpit view with Neck FX / POV / point of view / camera

messages.content: # Want to make your own roof cam or get a unique camera position? Follow this guide!

## Step 1
> Go into the game > Move your mouse to the right side of the screen > All Apps at the top 
> > Search for "Onboard Settings" or "First Person Camera"

## Step 2
> Configure then save your FoV
